title: Goldge 24 PCS Magic Snake Cube Fidget Toy for Kids, Party Bag Fillers, Twist Puzzle
features: High-quality material: The magic snake cube is made of ABS plastic, durable, smooth surface without burrs, comfortable to handle, which is safe for your children

Great gift for many occasions : This twist puzzle cube set suitable for children over 3 years old and adults, as birthday and Christmas gifts, school prizes, kids party bag fillers and party supplies etc, great DIY gifts for friends and for children

Multi-function, multi-fun: 3D Mini snake cubes is an educational toy. While playing and relaxing in free time, it can promote the coordination of children's eyes and hands, stimulate children's thinking ability and imagination, and a different kind of freshness and an infinite amount of fun

Rich creativity: Colorful colors attract more attention of children; snake magic twist puzzle toys can be changed at will, combined freely, and twisted into a variety of imaginative shapes and graphics, such as dogs, snakes, flamingos, dinosaurs , triangle, sphere and other shapes; it can also puzzle literacy. adults and children can complete it together, not only can release the pressure of adults, but also can develops children's cooperation skills, challenge and play fun together

Easy to carry: The size of mini snake cube is 23cm*1.3*0.9cm. Small and light, it can be used to play anytime and anywhere, and it is very convenient to carry and store when going out. It is suitable for performing on various occasions, allowing children to experience the joy of success
description: Product Description GOLDGE Twist Puzzle Toys: GOLDGE snake puzzles are suitable for children aged 3 and above. You can turn it into a straight line, snake, dog, stair or other imaginative shape. Can improve children's patience and thinking ability, stimulate kid’s spatial imagination and creativity; Good for creative thinking and intelligence development. Perfect gift for children Toys are a bridge between children and parents to maintain their emotional relationship. Therefore, a high-quality children's toy is a must have, which can be used as a birthday gift, Christmas gift, Halloween gift, etc. Develop kid’s brain and logic thinking ability Promote communication between children and parents. Perfect way to relieve stress. ABS Plastics: Highly curved, not easy to break Durable Material: Highly curved, not easy to break Exquisite Workmanship: Smooth surface, excellent hand feeling, will not cause scratches, suitable for children to grasp Warm notice: 1. The mini snake cube is not for children under 3 years old; Children of age 3-7, adult supervision required. 2.
